seoTitle: Maramingo Creek vs Mardan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Maramingo Creek and Mardan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Maramingo Creek vs Mardan: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Maramingo Creek and Mardan.
heading: Maramingo Creek vs Mardan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Maramingo Creek, Victoria and Mardan, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mardan has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Maramingo Creek (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Maramingo Creek or Mardan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Maramingo Creek has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Mardan scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Maramingo Creek scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Mardan scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Maramingo Creek or Mardan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mardan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
